title: Tick Control in Lenox Hill, Manhattan | $125 - $325
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Lenox Hill, Manhattan. Protect your family and pets from ticks. Same-day service available. Call now for $125 - $325 tick treatment.
intro: Lenox Hill's tree-lined streets, proximity to Central Park, and elegant residential buildings create an ideal environment for outdoor living—but also for ticks. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick control services to protect Lenox Hill families, pets, and properties from these dangerous pests. Our targeted treatments ensure your yards, gardens, and outdoor spaces remain safe and tick-free throughout the season.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC specializes in Lenox Hill's unique urban landscape, understanding how ticks thrive near Central Park and in the neighborhood's private gardens and green spaces. Our licensed technicians use eco-friendly treatments safe for children and pets, with flexible scheduling to accommodate the busy lifestyles of Lenox Hill residents.
localContext: Lenox Hill residents enjoying proximity to Central Park, the Frick Collection, and tree-lined streets like East 70th and East 77th face increased tick exposure during warmer months. The neighborhood's many prewar co-ops with gardens, townhouses with private yards, and frequent park visits make professional tick control essential for protecting families and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: Lenox Hill's proximity to Central Park and the neighborhood's many private gardens create prime tick habitats. Ticks can carry Lyme disease and other serious illnesses, making professional control essential for residents who enjoy outdoor activities or have pets that frequent parks and green spaces.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Lenox Hill?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in Lenox Hill range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer customized treatment plans and seasonal packages to provide ongoing protection throughout tick season.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Lenox Hill, Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Lenox Hill typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May through July. We recommend starting preventive treatments in early spring and maintaining regular applications throughout the season to protect your family and pets from tick bites.

faqs.question: Are tick control treatments safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments typically require a brief drying period of 2-4 hours before the area can be used normally, and we provide specific safety instructions for your property.
